name: xoloop
description: XOLoop is a verification and optimisation runtime for code improvement loops: build, simplify, polish, fuzz, benchmark, improve, autoresearch, audit, docs, overnight, finalize, verify, and optimise.

interface.shortDescription: Run evidence-led code verification, optimisation, and improvement loops
interface.longDescription: XOLoop gives Codex reusable workflows for code improvement: TDD build, deletion-focused simplify, polish, property fuzzing, deterministic benchmarks, benchmark-driven improve, audit, docs, overnight orchestration, finalize, and the /verify + /optimise goal runtime. It treats implementations as black-box interfaces and keeps reproducible evidence ledgers for verification and optimization runs.
defaultPrompt: Use XOLoop to verify this code with a machine-checkable goal contract
Use XOLoop to optimise this implementation while preserving verified behavior
Use XOLoop to polish, audit, fuzz, or benchmark this repository
